audit_items.proof_trace: The only heap-allocated pointer in the function is `line` (SDS), whose ownership is fully transferred to `rewriteConfigRewriteLine` on every call — that function either frees it (sdsfree at L1794) or stores it permanently in `state->lines` (L1808/L1816). The caller never accesses `line` after the call. All other pointers (`option`, `typename`) are static string literals that are never freed.
